title: Health Recap
tagline: One calm morning recap for sleep, movement, and recovery
summary: Apple Health had the numbers I cared about, but I wanted a faster way to understand them each morning. Health Recap turns sleep and movement into one score, one useful takeaway, and a clean daily view.
outcome: The native SwiftUI app now has correct overlap-safe sleep math, seven-day baselines, 11 focused domain tests, and an interactive browser demo anyone can review.
role: Designed and built the iPhone app myself
proofPoints: Overlap-safe sleep math and rolling seven-day baselines
11 focused tests around the health scoring rules
An interactive browser demo that mirrors the native recap
